c49d27af6f63a354.description: The Hijacked Sedan — The armored back-and-front cabin of a black luxury sedan, dashboard screens glowing an eerie blue, rain streaking the sealed windows, a locked partition between the front and back seats., ambient background loop, continuous atmosphere, no music, no voices, no sudden events

a22cb88d31c4b0e1.description: Dispatch Floor — Crestline Chauffeur Service's control room, a wall of monitors tracking the fleet's GPS pings under buzzing fluorescent light, radios murmuring over coffee-stained desks., ambient background loop, continuous atmosphere, no music, no voices, no sudden events

f816f6ad072bec93.description: The Vance Tower Penthouse — A glass-walled executive office forty floors up, city lights sprawling below, all steel and marble and cold minimalism., ambient background loop, continuous atmosphere, no music, no voices, no sudden events

2465fe69e6d92545.description: The Riverside Walk-Up — Marcus's cramped apartment above a laundromat, peeling wallpaper and a single window facing the elevated train tracks., ambient background loop, continuous atmosphere, no music, no voices, no sudden events

5688e34cf67d027c.description: Harrow Warehouse — An abandoned riverside warehouse with its collapsed east wing still fenced off, rusted machinery inside and old memorial photos taped to the chain-link outside., ambient background loop, continuous atmosphere, no music, no voices, no sudden events

915c7c18281c069a.description: The Cyber Crimes Bureau — A cluttered municipal office humming with server racks, a wall of monitors cycling through traffic-cam feeds from across the city., ambient background loop, continuous atmosphere, no music, no voices, no sudden events
